name: Sri Vidya Junior College

MPC + IIT-JEE.note: Integrated JEE Mains & Advanced coaching, weekend mock tests

MPC + EAPCET.note: Focused EAPCET coaching for engineering seats in Telangana/AP

BiPC + NEET.note: Integrated NEET coaching with NCERT-line teaching, botany/zoology labs

hostel.note: AC and non-AC rooms, veg/non-veg mess, warden supervision, weekly parent call slots

results.2025: 42 IIT seats, 118 NIT seats, 96 MBBS/BDS seats, 91% first-class in IPE boards
results.toppers: College topper AIR 214 in JEE Advanced 2025; NEET city topper 687/720

batchSize: Max 40 students per section, separate merit batches with weekly performance tracking
scholarships: Up to 100% tuition waiver based on 10th marks / entrance test score. Sliding scale from 9.0 GPA upward.
admissionProcess: Free campus visit and counselling session -> optional scholarship test (30 min) -> seat blocking with ₹5,000 (adjustable in first term fee, refundable within 7 days)

contact.office: Admissions office open 9 AM - 7 PM, all days

faq.College timings: 8:30 AM to 5:30 PM for day scholars; study hours till 8 PM optional
faq.Bus routes: College buses cover Kukatpally, Miyapur, KPHB, Madhapur, Gachibowli, Kondapur, Chandanagar and SR Nagar routes
faq.Weekly tests: Every Saturday, with a printed progress report; parents get marks on WhatsApp same evening
faq.Parent updates: Weekly WhatsApp progress report plus a monthly parent-teacher call slot
faq.Uniform: Yes, formal uniform for all students, included in first-year kit
faq.Food: Canteen with veg and non-veg; hostel mess menu rotates weekly

compliance.note: Leads in this queue are existing enquiries (walk-ins, website forms, referrals) — not cold DND-registry calls
